subject: [CDS] 17.0.0 chart release
commit_message:
[CDS] 17.0.0 chart release

- update images (1.8.1 -> 1.10.0)
- add tracing config
- adjust kafka config to advertise FQDN broker addresses [0]

[0] this resolves an issue in SO in which the SO cannot find the broker
    because the dns resolver cannot find it

Issue-ID: CCSDK-4151
Change-Id: I58ef24cb849a7ed9d6563e8de1776d12f89c94e0
Signed-off-by: Fiete Ostkamp <fiete.ostkamp@telekom.de>
